---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new recipe, modality, CLI capability, or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The claim or problem

<!--
panelforge recipes are organized by the *scientific claim* they visualize, not
the shape they draw. If you're proposing a new recipe, describe the claim a
reader should be able to make from the figure, and the modality it belongs to.
For other features, describe the problem you're trying to solve.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. For a recipe, name the modality and a candidate name
(`<modality>.<recipe>`, lowercase_snake_case). -->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
panelforge's design commitment: every recipe names at least one alternative in
the same modality and why it was rejected. If proposing a recipe, list the
nearest existing recipe(s) and why they don't cover this claim.
Check the catalog first:  figures list-recipes --by-modality
-->

## Scope / data class

<!-- Does this touch an off-host capability (LLM binding, vision, telemetry,
network plugins)? If so, note how it should behave under the clinical data class
(which forces those channels off by construction). -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else: references, mockups, related issues. -->
